name: Employment Hero
description: Australian HRIS, payroll and recruitment SaaS platform with open APIs; A$300M+ ARR.

seo.title: Employment Hero — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: Employment Hero: Australian HRIS, payroll and recruitment SaaS platform with open APIs; A$300M+ ARR.

when_to_use: Automating Australian payroll processing via open API
Employee onboarding workflows integrated with HRIS data
Recruitment pipeline synced with core HR for headcount
Leave approval automation for mid-sized Aussie companies
Syncing employment data with accounting tools like Xero

cons: APAC-focused, weak in US or EU
review.verdict: The default HR platform for Australian SMBs — elsewhere youll find sharper regional alternatives.
review.best_for: Australian and NZ SMBs consolidating HR, payroll, and hiring in one platform
review.not_for: US or European teams where Gusto, Rippling, or Personio fit better

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Per-seat pricing, no evidence of mid-term commit lock
